wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Bowler Hat|2}}
{{R|Bowler Hat||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} which increases all {{KW|Gold||2}} gains by 25%. It does not visually increase the amount gained by events or in combat rewards; the additional Gold is simply added to the current Gold total after the fact.

== Obtaining Bowler Hat ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.
* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.
<!--
* Can be obtained from the following events:
TODO: FIND RELIC SOURCES FROM EVENTS-->
=== Spawn Restrictions===
* '''Bowler Hat''' is not sold by [[Slay the Spire 2:The Merchant|The Merchant.]]
== Interactions ==
===Synergies===
* Because '''Bowler Hat''''s additional Gold is added ''separate'' from the initial sum, it creates a second trigger for {{R|Dragon Fruit||2}}, increasing maximum HP by a total of 2 each time gold is collected.
* When killing the [[Slay the Spire 2:Gremlin Merc|Fat Gremlin]], and recovering {{KW|Gold||2}} lost via {{BD|Thievery||2}}, the recovered Gold will be bolstered via '''Bowler Hat'''.
== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Gold gain increased from 20% -> 25%.
** Relics that generate Gold (such as Bowler Hat and Amethyst Aubergine) no longer appear at the Merchant.
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Bowler Hat to the game.
